profile.tagline: Software developer working mainly on web and mobile — for a living and because I enjoy it.

hero.stack: Vue · React · Kotlin · C# · Drone · Video

about.title: About me
about.bio1: I work as an R&D Software Engineer at NTT Data on Angular, .NET and React Native projects for enterprise clients. I also have experience on the backend side — Kotlin, C# — and mobile, built through a startup and a couple of internships.
about.bio2: Outside work: licensed APR drone pilot and Vice President of the Civil Protection of Saluggia. Curious by nature — from Raspberry Pi to LLMs, if it can be taken apart and put back together better, I'll try it.

contact.subtitle: Have a project, an idea, or just want to talk? Write to me.
